item.title: Channel connection — clawhq connect
steps: Create cmd/connect.go with the connect subcommand
Implement Telegram setup flow: walk through BotFather token creation, validate token, configure webhook
Implement WhatsApp setup flow: walk through Business API setup, validate credentials
Implement --test flag: send test message and verify response (bidirectional)
Store channel config in appropriate config files
Display connection status in status dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: `clawhq connect telegram` walks through setup with inline validation
Invalid credentials are caught during setup, not at runtime
